name: user-management
description: Application-side user + role management as an Encore service: an app-managed role catalog (app_role/user_role) keyed to the existing user_account identity, with admin CRUD endpoints behind auth + requireRole. The reference shape for feature modules (spec 009).

migrations.description: app_role catalog + user_role assignments (seeded with the template default roles)

USER_MGMT_DEFAULT_ROLE.description: Default app-managed role for new users (used by the opt-in provisioning seam; see spec 009)
